sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28161" key="dou/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δούλ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28161.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slavery,</tr_> prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δούλωσις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
